name: Core module
description: Implement a core module with a minimal interface.
prompt_template: Implement a core module with a minimal interface for: {input}.

name: API endpoint
description: Create a small API endpoint or service wrapper.

name: Utility module
description: Break core functionality into a small utility module.
prompt_template: Break core functionality into a small utility module for: {input}.

name: Adapter/wrapper
description: Create an adapter or wrapper for external service.
prompt_template: Create an adapter or wrapper for external service for: {input}.

name: Error handling scaffolding
description: Add error handling scaffolding and tests.
prompt_template: Add error handling scaffolding and basic tests for: {input}.

name: CI harness stub
description: Create a minimal CI/CD harness scaffold.

name: Configuration helper
description: Provide a minimal config helper module.
prompt_template: Provide a minimal configuration helper module for: {input}.

name: Packaging scaffold
description: Create a basic packaging scaffold for distribution.
